name: k/d chicken & vegetable stew dog food
description: when dogs have damage to kidney tissues, the kidneys cannot perform as well as before, like filtering and reabsorbing nutrients. the condition is not reversible, but progression may be slowed. therapeutic foods for kidney conditions are designed to help reduce workload on the kidneys, enabling them to function more effectively. dogs with decreased kidney function may experience loss of appetite and their food intake might decline. 낮은 함량의 인과 나트륨, 풍부한 오메가 3 지방산 activbiome+ kidney defense유해한 노폐물 감소를 위한 장내 미생물 활성화 반려동물의 건강 유지에 최적화된 필수 아미노산과 고품질 단백질
